## Amazon sales top $60 billion as Bezos backs AI startup CuspAI

Bezos backing CuspAI is an incremental signal on the private AI funding landscape and founder-level conviction in AI beyond AMZN's own stack; the $60B sales milestone reinforces AMZN's scale as an AI infrastructure and commerce compounder.

- Amazon's sales topped $60 billion per the headline, framing the company's business scale.
- Jeff Bezos is backing a company called CuspAI, adding a private AI ecosystem dimension to the AMZN story.
- Coverage positions AMZN as actively building out its business push.
- Dual signal: core commerce scale milestone plus founder's external AI venture bet.
